zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasin Walter於1534年1月出生在英國英格蘭艾可洛維爾時，她的父親William Walter34歲，母親Isabell Denton44歲。她於1559年6月29日與William lukyn在英國艾可馬申波利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1581年9月15日在英國艾可馬申波利享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 巴多福。

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

variants.name: Walthers
meanings: German: patronymic from the personal name Walther (see Walter ).

variants.name: McQuate
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uait ‘son of Uat’, Gaelic form of the personal name Wat, a short form of Walter . Compare the Irish form McQuaid .

variants.name: Waltke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Jurgen, Wilhelmina.
German: from a pet form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names formed with Old High German waltan ‘to rule’ as the first element, as in Walter .

variants.name: McWaters
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uaitéir, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of the personal name Walter , with excrescent English -s.

variants.name: Wahler
meanings: German:
from the personal name Wol(d)er, Low German form of Walter .
habitational name for someone from any of various places called Wahl, Wahle, or Wahlen.

variants.name: McWalter
meanings: Irish and Scottish: from Gaelic Mac Uaitéir ‘son of Walter ’.

variants.name: Walters
meanings: English: variant of Walter , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
German: patronymic from   Walter  .

variants.name: McQuaid
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Colum, Nuala.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uaid ‘son of Uad’, Gaelic form of the personal name Wat, a short form of Walter . Compare the Scottish form McQuate .

variants.name: Walther
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Erwin, Wolfgang, Otto, Gerhard, Gunter, Heinz, Klaus, Konrad, Bernd, Bernhard.
German, Dutch, Swedish, and Danish: variant of   Walter  .

variants.name: Lauter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Erwin, Kurt, Sigismund, Wolf.

German: topographic name and habitational name, from a common stream name meaning ‘clear’, from Middle High German hlutra, or from any of the places called Lauter or Lauta (Saxony). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and some other European countries.
Germanized or Americanized form of Slovenian Lavtar or its Croatized and rare Slovenian variant Lautar: from a dialect variant of the personal name Valter (see Walter ).

nameMeanings.name: Thomasin
meanings: A female name formed from Thomas

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasin Walter was born in January 1534, in Roxwell, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Walter, was 34 and her mother, Isabell Denton, was 44. She married William lukyn on 29 June 1559, in Mashbury, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 15 September 1581, in Mashbury, Essex, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Great Baddow, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasin Walter est née en janvier 1534, à Roxwell, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Walter, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Isabell Denton, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé William lukyn le 29 juin 1559, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 septembre 1581, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Great Baddow, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomasin Walterが1534年1月にイギリスイギリスエセックスロクスウエルで生まれた時，父William Walterは34歳，母Isabell Dentonは44歳であった。1559年6月29日にイギリスエセックスマシュブリーでWilliam lukynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1581年9月15日にイギリスエセックスマシュブリーで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト バッドオウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomasin Walter(이)가 1534년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 록스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Walter(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabell Denton(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1559년 6월 29일 영국 에세스 마스h버이에서 William lukyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1581년 9월 15일 영국 에세스 마스h버이에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 바도에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com William lukyn em 29 de junho de 1559, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasin Walter родилась январь 1534 г. в местности роксвелл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Walter было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Isabell Denton, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William lukyn 29 июня 1559 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 15 сентября 1581 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности грит баддоу, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
